Title: Earth
Desc: A photorealistic real-time 3-D Earth rendered in WebGL via Three.js. Features physically-based day/night shading with NASA satellite imagery, procedural cloud systems modelled on real atmospheric circulation (ITCZ, Hadley cell, mid-latitude storm tracks), ocean bathymetry with Fresnel specular glint, atmospheric limb halo, and a 15 000-star stellar background with colour-temperature-accurate scintillation. Fully customisable via Lively Properties.
Author: Victor C. Van Hee
